component.name: MainPage
component.script:
function init() m.navIndex = 0 m.top.setFocus(true) m.navItems = [ m.top.findNode("home"), m.top.findNode("blogs"), m.top.findNode("youtube") ]
for each item in m.navItems item.font.size = 26 end for
m.scrollContainer = m.top.createChild("Group") m.scrollContainer.translation = [30, 120] m.scrollContainer.clippingRect = [0, 0, 1220, 960]
m.CardItem = m.scrollContainer.createChild("CardItemMain") m.CardItem.translation = [0, 0]
m.scrollY = 0 m.scrollStep = 80
highlightNavItem()
m.CardItemRow = m.top.createChild("CardItemBlogs") m.CardItemRow.translation = [30, 120] m.CardItemRow.visible = false m.CardItemRow.observeField("close", "onBlogsClose")
m.blogsApiTask = CreateObject("roSGNode", "BlogsApiTask") m.blogsApiTask.observeField("result", "onBlogsApiResult") m.blogsApiTask.apiUrl = "https://opencollective.com/babel/members/all.json?TierId=1906&limit=10&offset=0" m.blogsApiTask.control = "RUN" end function
sub onBlogsApiResult() data = m.blogsApiTask.result ' if data <> invalid and data.count() > 0 then if data = invalid then return end if
for i = 0 to data.count() -1 item = data[i]
card = CreateObject("roSGNode", "Blogs") card.imgUrl = item.image card.name = item.name card.role = item.role card.description = item.description m.CardItemRow.appendChild(card) end for end sub
sub onBlogsClose() m.CardItemRow.visible = false m.top.setFocus(true) end sub
function highlightNavItem() for i = 0 to m.navItems.count() - 1 if i = m.navIndex then m.navItems[i].color = "0xFFFFFFFF" else m.navItems[i].color = "0x000000FF" end if end for end function
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if press then if key = "right" then m.navIndex = (m.navIndex + 1) mod m.navItems.count() highlightNavItem() return true else if key = "left" then m.navIndex = (m.navIndex - 1 + m.navItems.count()) mod m.navItems.count() highlightNavItem() return true else if key = "down" then m.scrollY = m.scrollY - m.scrollStep if m.scrollY < -800 then m.scrollY = -800 end if m.CardItem.translation = [0, m.scrollY] return true else if key = "up" then m.scrollY = m.scrollY + m.scrollStep if m.scrollY > 0 then m.scrollY = 0 m.CardItem.translation = [0, m.scrollY] return true else if key = "OK" then if m.navIndex = 1 then m.CardItemRow.visible = true m.CardItemRow.setFocus(true) end if return true end if end if return false end function
